reviews.comment:
Una fila terrible para cargar y solo te dejan del lado de tu tanque, dos surtidores sin uso porque casi todos los autos tienen la tapa del tanque de la derecha, en vez de agilizar te hacen perder más tiempo, encima los autos con la tapa del lado izquierdo tampoco podían entrar por la fila que había, osea que no se podía usar esa opción. Lo único era perder el tiempo haciendo fila. Nunca más cargo ahí

(Translated by Google)
The line to fill up was terrible, and they only let you pump on your side of the tank. Two pumps weren't even being used because almost all cars have their tank cap on the right. Instead of speeding things up, they made you waste even more time. To top it off, cars with the cap on the left couldn't get in because of the line, so that option was useless. All it did was waste time waiting in line. I'm never filling up there again.
